title: Section 7C
content: 1[7C. Power to direct exhibition of films for examination. --- For the purpose of exercising any of the powers conferred on it by this Act, the Central Government 2[, the 3[High Court] ]or the Board may require any any film to be exhibited before it or before 4[any person or authority] specified by it in this behalf.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-6-1983). 2. Ins. by s. 14, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-6-1983). 3. Subs. by Act 33 of 2021, s. 9, for Tribunal (w.e.f. 4-4-2021). 4. Subs. by s. 14, ibid., for any person (w.e.f. 1-6-1983).
